```{=typst}
#show link: it => if type(it.dest) == str {
  [#it.body#footnote([#raw(it.dest)])]
} else {
  it
}
```

## Summary

Quarterly on-time performance held above 80% across the network.

## Recommendations

Revisit the [Summary](#summary) for context, and see the [Q1 on-time dashboard](https://transit.example.com/ontime/2026-q1) for the full breakdown by route.
